calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen McDonagh, via ZOOM, for Jeff Strobel, via ZOOM, Petitioner; Avid Alavi, via ZOOM, for Bennett Hong, via ZOOM, Special Administrator of The Mehegan Estate; Tan Vo, via ZOOM, for the Dominican Sisters of San Jose, Interested Party.

The court confirms with Ms. Alavi that she is waiving notice in this matter. The court then queries the parties whether there are any objections to the court granting this petition. None are presented.

The Petition for Order to Confirm Validity of Trust, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Brandon Slykhous. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Continued To Sep-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Continued To Aug-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Aug-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen McDonagh, via ZOOM, for Jeff Strobel, Petitioner.

The court begins by asking counsel regarding his plans to appoint a neutral third party to act as special administrator of Virginia's probate estate. Mr. McDonagh reports that he was unclear regarding the Examiner's notes and will file a petition for appointment of a special administrator. The court instructs counsel to file a petition for appointment of a special administrator and to submit evidence to confirm that the property in San Mateo County described in Virginia's trust is the same property described in the 2001 court order for final distribution.

The Petition for Order to Confirm Validity of Trust, etc., is continued to August 2, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
